## Checklist
- [ ] All claims have source URLs
- [ ] T2 claims tagged `[UNVERIFIED]`
- [ ] Assessments tagged `[ASSESSMENT]`
- [ ] No PII (IC numbers, phone numbers) included
- [ ] File naming follows convention (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Escalation register updated if flags changed
